name: sgs/buybox
title: Buybox
description: WooCommerce single-product buybox: wires the SGS option-picker pills to the shipped cart proxy engine. Renders per-axis pickers, live price row, stock status, and an accessible add-to-cart form. Falls back to core WC blocks for simple products or when WooCommerce is absent.

soldOutLabel.description: Aria-label suffix appended to pill labels when a combination is sold out. Shown to screen readers only.

unavailableLabel.description: Aria-label suffix appended to pill labels when a combination does not exist for the current selections.

notifyEnabled.description: Show the 'notify me when back in stock' email-capture form on out-of-stock variations.

notifyMeLabel.description: Heading/label for the back-in-stock notify-me form.

addToCartLabel.description: Override the Add to Cart button label. Empty = use the default translated string.

perUnitDenomination.description: Override the per-unit denomination template. Use %s as the placeholder for the unit label (e.g. 'per bar', 'per 100g'). Empty = translated default 'per %s'.

showLadder.description: Show the comparative value-ladder table. Set false to suppress it (e.g. in narrow sidebar contexts).

framingMode.description: Saving-label framing: 'savings' (positive), 'loss-aversion' (adds 'vs buying singly' tail), or 'neutral' (no saving label).

decoyEnabled.description: When true, the 'Best value' badge targets the 2nd-largest pack (decoy effect) instead of the largest.
